query_normalized: the impact of visual attention patterns on susceptibility to misleading headlines psychology
rationale: This paper is off-domain entirely for the user's psychology research question. While both involve "eye tracking" terminology, this paper is a computer vision/machine learning engineering paper about event-camera eye tracking algorithms and technical performance metrics, not a psychology study measuring visual attention patterns in relation to misinformation susceptibility.
